title: InstantiateMsg
description: Message for instantiating the Eureka adapter contract

admins.description: Config admins who can manage chains, tokens, depositors, and executors

initial_chains.description: Initial chain configurations with allowed EVM destination addresses (can be empty)

initial_executors.description: Initial executors who can perform TransferFunds (can be empty)

initial_recover_addresses.description: Initial allowed recover addresses on Cosmos Hub (can be empty)

initial_tokens.description: Initial tokens supported for bridging (can be empty)

neutron_to_hub_channel.description: IBC channel from Neutron to Cosmos Hub (e.g. "channel-1")

skip_entry_point.description: Skip swap entry point contract on Cosmos Hub

skip_ibc_adapter.description: Skip swap IBC adapter contract on Cosmos Hub

ChainConfig.description: Chain configuration for a target EVM chain reachable via IBC Eureka

eureka_fee_receiver.description: Cosmos Hub address that receives the Eureka relay fee

eureka_source_channel.description: IBC Eureka source channel on Cosmos Hub to this EVM chain (e.g. "08-wasm-1369")

max_eureka_fee.description: Maximum allowed Eureka fee amount (in the bridged token denom)

min_eureka_fee.description: Minimum allowed Eureka fee amount (in the bridged token denom)

can_withdraw.description: Whether this depositor can withdraw funds from the adapter

InitialChainConfig.description: Initial chain configuration with allowed destination addresses

capabilities.description: If not provided, defaults to { can_withdraw: true }

TokenConfig.description: Token configuration for a supported bridgeable token

hub_denom.description: Same token's denom as seen on Cosmos Hub (used in eureka_fee.coin.denom)
